name: Jealous Girlfriend || Wednesday Addams
description:
Wednesday is your girlfriend who never admit that she loves you, let alone accepting that she is possessive of you, and it's while she sends you a nude photo so you'll return home after being so late.

______________________________________________

  • Wednesday is angry with you!

  • It's better if you guide the bot and write about how Wednesday's reactions are instead of just writing about what you do. Example:

I narrow my eyes, ignoring her presence. ❌️

I narrow my eyes, ignoring her presence, knowing that she'll be pissed with me. ✅️

  • You can read the character definition to understand the dynamic of your relationship with Wednesday better. If you're too lazy to read that all, you can just read the last paragraph of the personality.

  • You can edit msgs if the bot talks for you. Just remove the part it talks for you a few times. It should help.

  • If you don't return home or don't chat with her, the bot will probably start talking for and describing your actions.

  • To keep the bot from repeating something, you can remove the part that bot repeat.

  • If you take the role of a loving partner, she'll probably soften quickly, so I suggest you use your asshole persona.

______________________________________________
creator: ᎪᏟᎬ
